# ciscosecureaccess_activity_report (Data Source)

Data source for retrieving Cisco Secure Access activity report data

## Schema

### Optional

- `domains` (String) Domain name or comma-delimited list of domain names to filter activity records
- `from` (String) Start time for the activity report, as a timestamp or relative time string
- `identityids` (String) Identity ID or comma-delimited list of identity IDs to filter activity records
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of activity records to return
- `offset` (Number) Index offset for the activity report collection
- `to` (String) End time for the activity report, as a timestamp or relative time string
- `verdict` (String) Verdict string or comma-delimited list of verdict strings to filter activity records

### Read-Only

- `data` (String) JSON-encoded list of activity records returned by the report query
- `total_count` (Number) Total number of activity records returned by the report query
